description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is streamlined and painted primarily white, with blue and yellow accent stripes along the side. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and features a clear, enclosed canopy with visible windows. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both with clean, angular lines. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear includes two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The overall design suggests a light general aviation aircraft, suitable for personal or training use.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with a white fuselage, blue and yellow stripes, and tricycle landing gear. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, streamlined fuselage, and tail with blue and yellow stripes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full wingspan, nose-mounted propeller, and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the high-wing, cockpit, and tail design with accent stripes.
description_view_3: Rear frontal view showing the cockpit windows, propeller, and symmetrical wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
